title: Remove runc edit to lock to specific version
body:
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/19795

comments.body: 1MB bloat? Do we really want this?
If you want to revendor, I recommend taking the latest commit in runc main and manually pinning to that; otherwise it wants to put us on the v1.1 branch.
Ok I just rebased to main branch which seems to be 1.2 RC, and much smaller changes.
Please rebase to make CI pass
